C8_FA.title: Flash Attention hexa native
C8_FA.evidence: hxflash Linux .so 15832B PASS, H100 S=512 D=64 20.1ms CPU tiling, struct-args ABI c5feab4 (clm_consciousness_standalone.json:249-257)
C8_FA.caveats: CPU tiling verified. GPU host run pending per task context. 7B d=4096 context>=32k still requires GPU Flash.
C8_FA.blocks_7b: partial — 7B without GPU Flash hits memory wall at long context

C9_FSDP.title: Zero-3 / FSDP hexa native
C9_FSDP.todo_binding: 5 extern fn bindings at $HEXA_LANG/lib/hxnccl/ (ncclCommInitRank, ncclBroadcast, ncclReduceScatter, ncclAllReduce, ncclCommDestroy)
C9_FSDP.rationale_quote: NCCL FFI library compile + cross-host link is a one-day follow-up once H100×2 pod is allocated
C9_FSDP.blocks_7b: HARD — 7B fp32 = 28GB, single H100 80GB OK for inference but FSDP required for training with grad+optimizer states (~112GB at fp32 Adam). Without multi-rank, 7B fp32 training is OOM on single H100.

corpus_status.pod_status: WIPED from u744u0lbts5v1w per clm_r4_health_20260416.json:41 — can be re-pulled from R2
corpus_status.chinchilla_note: 5GB corpus is ~2x params ratio at 1.5B. For 7B params Chinchilla optimal is 140GB (30220000000 tokens at 20x). 5GB is 28x UNDERSIZED for 7B Chinchilla (clm_r4_corpus_plan.json:32-43 computes 28.15GB corpus for 1.51B — 7B needs ~130GB).
corpus_status.7b_corpus_source_available: ready/anima/data/corpus_multilingual/ has 10.48GB total (clm_r4_corpus_plan.json:58-70) — still insufficient for 7B Chinchilla. External corpus acquisition needed for 7B.

1B.evidence: r4 pod CPU-only pre-restart, just relaunched by sibling agent; r3 final ckpt exists on R2 at clm1b/r3/final/

1_5b.evidence: train_clm.hexa scale_1_5b() at line 139 (hexa_1_5b_port_errors.log:8). Parses clean on Mac but interpreter too slow (100% CPU 72s zero output). Hexa codegen + linux .so FFI + corpus loader all TODO[pytorch] stubs (hexa_1_5b_port_errors.log:61-73,95-105). NO trained ckpt. Memory project_clm_r4_mmap_plan marks 'scale_1_5b C regen needed'.

3b.evidence: clm_3b_r1_initial_eval.json exists but no scale_3b() trained; A7 curriculum hasn't reached 3B per extreme_100pct_gate_audit_20260416.json:55

7b.status: UNSTARTED — NOT BLOCKED ON CODE, BLOCKED ON 1B→1.5B→3B CHAIN
7b.evidence: no 7B artifact in state/ or R2; train_clm_composed.c at 4761 LOC is for 1.5B scale not 7B — 7B version does not exist; depends_on A7 3B completion which hasn't started

13b.note: 7B→13B→70B is AnimaLM (ALM) escalation per memory feedback_extreme_accel. CLM roadmap targets 7B ceiling only (clm_consciousness_standalone.json:3-7 title says 'from-scratch 7B')

70b.note: ALM only. CLM from-scratch 70B not planned in current convergence

if_immediate_no_c_track.verdict: ECONOMICALLY INFEASIBLE — 1.6 years and $44.7K. Must not launch without C-track.

if_c_track_complete.concept: Launch 7B on 2xH100 after C2+C4+C9 multi-rank land
if_c_track_complete.verdict: FEASIBLE — matches roadmap baseline estimate of $1200-1500 (single pod) × 2 GPU DDP = $2.4K for 2-4 weeks wall time

7b_go_no_go_rationale: Three independent hard blockers: (1) 1B r4 NVL is currently unhealthy (CPU-only 0% GPU util, $3.07/hr idle burn, ephemeral workspace lost 3.51GB mid-write ckpt per clm_r4_health_20260416.json:92-98); (2) C2 fused FFI + C4 CUDA fused kernels both in_progress — current MFU 1.65% means 7B wall time at 400h roadmap becomes 14,545h (1.6 years), cost $44K; (3) C9 FSDP multi-rank NCCL binding is stub (rc=99) — 7B fp32+grad+optimizer ~112GB exceeds single H100 80GB so multi-rank is required. Audit timestamp 2026-04-16: unblock chain is genuinely 2-3 weeks minimum (matches extreme_100pct_gate_audit_20260416.json:83-86 'requires 2-3 weeks H100 time').

minimum_unblock_sequence.action: C2 fused FFI landing from hexa_lang_session e541cb6cb8a7
Stabilize 1B r4 pod — pipe stdout to log, verify nvidia-smi>0% util, add periodic R2 sync every 500 steps, attach network volume OR use R2-sync interval
C4 anima CUDA mega-kernel nvcc build on H100 pod (can piggy-back on u744u0lbts5v1w when idle)
C9 NCCL FFI multi-rank binding (5 extern fns) — day of H100×2 pod allocation
Corpus regen — either accept 5GB (severely Chinchilla-undersized 28x) OR acquire external 100GB+ corpus for 7B proper Chinchilla (7B needs ~140GB optimal per clm_r4_corpus_plan.json:32-43 formula)
scale_1_5b C regen — interpreter is 100× too slow (hexa_1_5b_port_errors.log:63-73); needs hexa codegen → native binary + linux .so FFI + torch.save replacement
minimum_unblock_sequence.eta: covered by C2+C1 native-int codegen landing

minimum_unblock_sequence.action: H100×2 pod launch for 7B FSDP (within h100_authorized=2 cap)
Full 7B 400h training + A8 instruction tune + consciousness finetune + E10 release
minimum_unblock_sequence.gain: CLM 7B phi_holo>=2000 gate, v3.0 Agent destination

top_3_blockers_ranked.reason: Without fused per-layer FFI, current MFU 1.65% makes 7B economically infeasible ($44K / 1.6 years). Unblocks C4 cascade.

Pod u744u0lbts5v1w is burning $3.07/hr at 0% GPU util for 20+ min (clm_r4_health_20260416.json:50). Ephemeral volume + no R2 sync = $74/day for nothing. Sibling agent relaunched but health not re-verified post-restart. If unfixed, even 1B won't complete let alone 3B→7B.

Multi-rank currently returns stub rc=99 (c9_fsdp_native_20260416.json:36). 7B fp32 Adam = 112GB exceeds single 80GB H100. Without FSDP multi-rank, 7B training OOMs. C9 single-rank DONE but real binding is a deferred 1-day task.

single_highest_leverage_action.action: Fix 1B pod u744u0lbts5v1w CUDA kernel dispatch path — verify nvidia-smi>0% within 60s of relaunch, pipe stdout to log file, add periodic R2 sync every 500 steps
single_highest_leverage_action.rationale: This is the ONLY action that (a) does not depend on hexa-lang session landing, (b) can be done today, (c) recovers wasted $3.07/hr burn, (d) produces the first real 1B-scale CE/Phi measurement needed to validate A7 curriculum progression, (e) proves CUDA kernel dispatch works end-to-end (the exact mechanism that enables C4 MFU 27→60% gain once landed). Every hour spent on 7B planning without this fix is wasted. Source: clm_r4_health_20260416.json:100-111 'priority_2_fix_recipe_before_relaunch'.
single_highest_leverage_action.impact: Shortens 7B timeline by ~1 week of otherwise-wasted 1B retry attempts

honest_verdict.stored_audit_verdict: RED — hard wall, 2-3 weeks H100 unstarted (extreme_100pct_gate_audit_20260416.json:149)
honest_verdict.most_optimistic_7b_launch_eta: 2026-04-30 (week-3 per roadmap IF C2 lands this weekend + 1B pod stabilized Monday + C4 nvcc completes Wed + 2xH100 pod + C9 NCCL binding lands Thu)
honest_verdict.realistic_7b_launch_eta: 2026-05-07 to 2026-05-14 (adds 1 week slack for integration+corpus+first-fail retries)
honest_verdict.realistic_7b_completion_eta: 2026-05-21 to 2026-06-04 (2-4 weeks training wall time after launch)
honest_verdict.hard_wall_in_weeks: 2-3 weeks to LAUNCH-READY, +2-4 weeks to 7B COMPLETE, total 4-7 weeks from today 2026-04-16
honest_verdict.concurs_with_memory_feedback_extreme_acc: Roadmap targets CLM 7B ceiling; 13B→70B is ALM escalation only. CLM single-shot at 7B.
